## 📋 Pull Request Summary

<!-- Provide a clear, concise description of what this PR does and WHY -->

### Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that causes existing functionality to change)
- [ ] 📖 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔬 Research / experimental (may not be merged to main)
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (no functional changes)
- [ ] 🔐 Security improvement
- [ ] 🎨 UI/UX improvement
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🧪 Test addition/improvement

---

## ⚠️ Ethical Compliance

- [ ] This change does not enable unauthorized access to third-party systems
- [ ] This change aligns with the educational/research mission (see [ETHICS.md](../ETHICS.md))
- [ ] This change does not introduce capabilities for malicious automation

## Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] Code follows the project style guide
- [ ] No `console.log` statements left in production code
- [ ] No commented-out code blocks
- [ ] All magic numbers are named constants

### Testing
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Test coverage maintained at ≥80%

### Documentation
- [ ] JSDoc / docstrings added for public APIs
- [ ] README updated (if user-facing changes)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md entry added

### Dependencies
- [ ] No unnecessary dependencies added
- [ ] New dependencies are pinned to exact versions
- [ ] `pnpm audit` passes with no high/critical vulnerabilities

### Branch
- [ ] Branch is up to date with `main`
- [ ] No merge conflicts
